title: Dw7700B Dw60Dg790I00 Energy Efficiency Waterjet Clean 14 Place Settings Silver Dw60Dg790Fslgu
features: Save energy but clean and dry dishes effectively. Under the European energy labelling system, it has a high energy efficiency rating with A energy label*. Using an innovative All-in-one Sump, it consumes less power and only 9.4 liters of water** without impacting on its washing performance.

Clean dirty dishes powerfully and effectively. Under the European energy labelling system, it holds a B class energy efficiency rating*. Using an innovative All-in-one Sump, it consumes less power and only 9.4 liters of water** without impacting on its washing performance.

Clean dirty dishes powerfully and effectively. Under the European energy labelling system, it holds a C class energy efficiency rating*. Using an innovative All-in-one Sump, it consumes less power and only 9.2 liters of water** without impacting on its washing performance.

Get outstanding washing results using the new WaterJet Clean™. With rotating dual wash arms it delivers intensive cleaning from every angle. Its two spray arms have separate water jets and rotate in opposite directions. So it cleans heavily soiled pots, pans and dishes rapidly and thoroughly.

Optimize how you use the dishwasher to suit your lifestyle. The SmartThings App* lets you remotely monitor and control it on a smartphone. It also suggests the most effective courses based on how you cook, while helping you reduce energy use, manage consumables and diagnose and resolve errors.

Enhance how you use the dishwasher. The SmartThings App* lets you remotely control settings and start it in periods of low electricity cost or low carbon intensity. It also suggests courses based on how you have cooked, and helps reduce energy use, manage consumables and troubleshoot errors.

Wash economically and reduce your home’s carbon footprint – automatically. When Optimal Scheduling is activated in the SmartThings App*, you can start your washing during off-peak times** when the cost of electricity is low. You can also choose to start it in periods of low carbon intensity.

Monitor your dishwasher’s energy use. Using artificial intelligence, AI Energy* mode monitors its power consumption and predicts its ongoing usage. If the monthly electricity bill might exceed your target, you can turn on the energy saving mode, so the dishwasher uses up to 23% less energy**.

Customize your cleaning experience whenever you want. A Download Program option lets you choose from 4 additional specialist programs and instantly download the one you want using the SmartThings App* on a smartphone. Just select the “Pots and Pans”, “Plastic”, “Baby Care” or “Drinkware” cycle.

Reduce noise in your home. The dishwasher works smoothly and quietly as it has an Inverter motor that reduces friction. It also has an Extra Silence program that washes a little bit slower, but creates 2dB less noise than the ECO program*. The amount of noise it makes is quieter than a library.

Enjoy sparkling clean dishes every time with the Auto Open Door feature. When the rinse and dry process is complete, the door automatically opens 10cm to allow steam to escape. It gives you effective drying results compared to conventional methods*, especially for small items.

Fit in various sized dishes, glasses and cups. The middle rack’s tines can be adjusted across 3 settings using a lever and it has a glass holder. A high lower rack with foldable tines at the front helps load dishes and bowls stably, while tines at the back fold down fully to load large items.

Check if your dishwasher is working with one quick glance! The Floor Info Light projects a blue beam onto the floor when a wash cycle is in progress. It is easy to see, even from a distance. And as soon as your dishes are clean and ready to be unloaded the light turns off. So no more guessing!

Stay safe from unexpected water damage with the Aqua Stop safety function. It shuts off the water supply and the electrical connection to stop the operation of the dishwasher if it detects small traces* of water. So it lessens you from electrical shocks and potentially expensive water damage.

Keep the inside of the dishwasher hygienic, while being eco-friendly. Using Machine Care you can clean the cavity with one touch of a button. It removes dirt and odor-causing bacteria using only water, so you don’t need harsh detergent. And it automatically notifies you when it needs cleaning.

Make sure that your dishwasher fits seamlessly into your kitchen furniture. The Kitchen Fit™ Sliding Door features a sliding hinge that allows the door cover to slide upwards when the door is opened. So, unlike a fixed hinge, the door can be opened fully without having to cut the plinth below.
